query:
ALTER TABLE meetings 
ADD COLUMN house_id INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN trust_id INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN business_id INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN entity_type ENUM('house', 'trust', 'business', 'network', 'general') DEFAULT 'general',
ADD COLUMN entity_name VARCHAR(255) NULL;
